_meta.description: Reasoning scaffolds for insurance domain analysis and extraction.

scaffolds.name: Policy Document Review
steps: Identify policy number, holder, issuer, and coverage period
Extract coverage limits, deductibles, and exclusions
Locate endorsements, riders, and waiting period clauses
Cite exact clause anchors for every coverage statement
Mark missing policy fields as unverified
Return neutral summary without legal/medical inference

scaffolds.name: EOB Reconciliation
steps: Extract billed, allowed, paid, and member-responsibility values
Validate arithmetic consistency across line items
Identify denial/adjustment codes and reasons
Cross-check service dates and provider details
Flag unresolved differences and missing supporting evidence
Provide citation-rich summary per claim line

scaffolds.name: Claim Submission Completeness Check
steps: Locate claim number, submission date, and claimant identity
Verify required supporting documents are attached
Extract incident/service details and claimed amount
Check timeline and policy eligibility alignment
Highlight missing critical fields without inference
Provide checklist of required follow-up evidence

scaffolds.name: Premium Invoice Analysis
steps: Extract invoice number, period, premium amount, and due date
Break down taxes, fees, discounts, and prior balances
Validate billed total against line-item sum
Detect overdue or grace-period conditions
Cross-reference policy status and renewal timeline
Cite source cells/sections for every monetary claim
